title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: IBM Technology's Mixture of Experts podcast episode reviews Anthropic's new Claude Fable 5 model and its tier routing system, discusses Apple's pivot to NVIDIA for cloud-based AI at WWDC 2026 instead of on-device processing, and debates whether AI models can detect sarcasm through context and multimodal inputs.
writeup: This Mixture of Experts podcast episode from IBM Technology covers three topics: Anthropic's new Claude Fable 5 model and its tier routing system, Apple's shift to NVIDIA for cloud-based AI at WWDC 2026 rather than on-device processing, and whether AI models can detect sarcasm using context and multimodal inputs. The Apple discussion matters because it signals a move away from on-device inference toward cloud infrastructure. The sarcasm segment frames detection as a question of context and multimodal learning rather than text alone.
